description: Persistent accept-list of editorially-verified scanner false positives for the book/tools/audit/ pipeline. Round 3 (2026-04-24) cleared all 5 pass-16 entries because their abbreviations (IR, RISC, GEMM, MIPS, SLA) became baseline-exempt per the expanded §10.5 exempt list. Any future editorial FP (where the scanner's canonical expansion would produce factually wrong text, break a proper noun, or violate §9 protected-callout structural labels) should be documented here with a specific rule citation.
